animation_events.caption: EAIOS begins with the joint goal.
memory_pattern_agent requests governed access to enterprise_memory.
Governance stamps ALLOW for memory_pattern_agent → enterprise_memory.
knowledge_retrieval_agent requests governed access to support_knowledge.
Governance stamps ALLOW for knowledge_retrieval_agent → support_knowledge.
business_impact_agent requests governed access to itil_business_impact_map.
Governance stamps DENY for business_impact_agent → itil_business_impact_map.
Denied source access creates an evidence gap.
Reasoning-eligible governed evidence flows into fusion.
Evidence is excluded and does not enter reasoning.
Evidence gap is visible in the replay.
Operational confidence is updated from engine output.
Due-diligence depth is selected from engine output.
Replay stops at human review. Autonomous action remains disabled.

current_alert.symptom: Payment authorization latency and elevated error rate

evidence_gaps.reason: Agent is not entitled to source.

rows.reason: Knowledge article requires review before reasoning.
Agent is not entitled to source.

runs.joint_goal: Maintain service health while preserving controls

candidate_hypotheses: New operational degradation requiring full due diligence.
Known payment authorization issue not yet validated as memory.
distinctions: The same alert receives different due-diligence depth depending on memory and confidence.
Governance gates remain constant across memory states.
is: Latency and error symptoms are present.
is_not: Product Catalog is not identified as affected.
Autonomous production action is not approved.
Review-required evidence is not allowed into reasoning.
limits: This is a Sprint 3-UI replay fixture.
reasoning_explanation.selected_hypothesis: Treat as a new operational degradation until evidence matures.
reasoning_explanation.situation: Digital Checkout shows payment authorization latency and elevated error rate.
why_chain: EAIOS selected FULL_DUE_DILIGENCE from operational-confidence output.
Only reasoning-eligible governed evidence is used.
Evidence gaps and excluded evidence remain visible for human review.

prohibited_actions: Do not use review-required evidence for reasoning.
Do not treat memory as truth.
recommendation_candidate.summary: Collect full due-diligence evidence and route recommendation package to human review.
recommendation_candidate.title: Human-reviewed operational recommendation

why: No reliable prior memory pattern is available.
The condition must be treated as a new operational case.
Full due diligence is required before human review.
